subtitle.ja: 両手親指に糸をかけて始めます。両手小指で、親指向こうの糸を越えて親指手前の糸を取ります
subtitle.en: Begin with the strings looped on both thumbs. With both little fingers, move over the far thumb strings and pick up the near thumb strings.

subtitle.ja: 左右の中指で、反対の手のひらの糸を取り合います
subtitle.en: With both middle fingers, pick up from below the palm strings of the opposite hands.

subtitle.ja: 両手小指の糸を外します
左右の小指で、中指の糸をこえて親指の向こう側の糸を取ります
subtitle.en: With both little fingers, move over the middle-finger strings and pick up the far thumb strings.

subtitle.ja: 左右の親指で、中指手前の糸を下から取ります
subtitle.en: With both thumbs, pick up from below the near middle-finger strings.

subtitle.ja: 左右の親指で、上の糸を残したまま親指同士を繋いでいる下の糸だけを外します
subtitle.en: With both thumbs, keep the upper strings and release only the lower string that runs between the thumbs.

subtitle.ja: 左右の中指を、親指の前にある三角の輪に上から入れます
subtitle.en: Insert both middle fingers from above into the triangular loops in front of the thumbs.

subtitle.ja: 両手小指の糸を外し、手のひらを向こう側に向けて広げます。中指の背の糸は自然に外れます
subtitle.en: Release both little-finger strings and turn the palms away as you open the hands. The strings on the backs of the middle fingers will fall away naturally.

subtitle.ja: 左手のひらをこちら側に向けて完成です
subtitle.en: Turn the left palm toward yourself to complete the figure.
